name: CaneyCloud
one_liner: Hotel operating system for Venezuela — posadas, boutique hotels, and hostels sell, operate, and collect payments from one place.
overview:
CaneyCloud is a hotel operating system built for Venezuelan hospitality — posadas, boutique hotels, hostels, glamping, and apartment-hotels. It brings reservations, WhatsApp sales, payments, and invoicing into a single platform, replacing the scattered spreadsheets, chat groups, and disconnected payment systems small operators run on today.

The product covers the whole operating loop: a drag-and-drop reservation calendar synced against Booking.com, Airbnb, Expedia and direct channels; a point of sale for restaurant, minibar, tours and spa; operational inventory; dynamic pricing driven by occupancy and demand; and an AI-assisted WhatsApp agent that answers with the hotel's own context while the team keeps control.
moat: Built Venezuela-first, where global PMS vendors don't reach: dual-currency operation (USD and VES) with SENIAT-compatible fiscal invoicing, channel sync designed for zero overbooking across OTAs and direct sales, and WhatsApp — the channel Venezuelan hotels actually sell on — treated as a first-class sales surface with AI assistance under team oversight.
business_model: SaaS subscription for hospitality operators. Hotels start on a free tier — up to two users, no credit card — and grow into paid plans as the team and property scale.

specifics.Market: Posadas, boutique hotels, hostels, glamping — Venezuela
specifics.Product: PMS + channel manager + POS + WhatsApp AI agent

name: VamosaVenezuela
one_liner: A travel platform for the Venezuela you haven't seen — curated stays, dining, and experiences across every region of the country.
overview:
VamosaVenezuela is a travel guide and trip-planning platform for Venezuelan tourism. It curates places to stay, dining, and activities across eight regions — Los Roques, Mérida and the Andes, Canaima and Angel Falls, Morrocoy, Margarita, Gran Sabana, Caracas, Barquisimeto — plus landscape categories from beaches and islands to tepuis and jungle.

Beyond destination guides, the platform ships real planning tools: an interactive map, flight search, sample trips, and a custom itinerary builder. Every destination carries an editorial safety rating, so travelers know what to expect before they commit.
moat: Editorial curation plus a per-destination safety-rating system — a trust layer no generic travel site offers for Venezuela. The content depth across all eight regions, hidden gems included, is the kind of ground-truth coverage a competitor can't scrape together quickly.
business_model: Audience-first: the platform builds traffic through curated destination content, with flight search and stay/experience listings as the natural referral and booking surfaces to monetize as the audience grows.

specifics.Tools: Interactive map, flight search, itinerary builder

name: PIPA Database
one_liner: An early-stage data platform, currently incubating — "PIPA Database" is a working title.
overview: PIPA Database is an early-stage internal build, still in incubation. The name is a working title, and the public write-up will land here once the project is further along.
